testcase.name: verifyAccountDetailsSection

failure.message: Account Details heading should be displayed expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Account Details heading should be displayed expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
